violations.text: The ice machine is lacking a proper air gap (Condensate drainpipe end sits into the floor drain not allowing for a proper Air Gap). The ice machine drainpipe is to be adjusted (set higher) so as to ensure the end of the drainpipe does not sit below or into the flood rim of the floor drain. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/13/2025

The ice machine is lacking a proper air gap (Condensate drainpipe end sits into the floor drain not allowing for a proper Air Gap). A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 02/13/2025

The ice machine is lacking a proper air gap (Condensate drain pipe end sits into the floor drain not allowing for an Air Gap). A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 02/29/2024
